# Mauricio Rodríguez - Full-Stack Developer Portfolio

Personal portfolio showcasing projects, tech stack, and professional journey.

## Pages

- [Home](https://immau14.vercel.app/) - Landing page with featured projects, tech stack, and contact info
- [About](https://immau14.vercel.app/about) - Background, education, journey, and links
- [Projects](https://immau14.vercel.app/projects) - All projects with technology filters

## Source

- [README](https://github.com/ImMau14/web-portfolio) - Project documentation and setup instructions

## Tech Stack

- **Framework**: Astro with React
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **Backend**: Drizzle ORM, LibSQL
- **Deployment**: Vercel
- **Other**: TypeScript, Motion (Framer Motion), Sharp (image optimization)

## About

This is a personal portfolio site for Mauricio Rodríguez (ImMau14), a systems engineering student and full-stack developer based in Venezuela. Built with Astro for performance, React for interactive components, and deployed on Vercel.
